006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.resource;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
027
028/**
029 * Default immutable implementation of {@link HttpResource}: an {@link HttpBody} bundled with a set of
030 * associated headers (such as {@code Content-Type}, {@code Content-Disposition}, or {@code Content-Language}).
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Useful for static-file delivery, multipart form parts, and other scenarios where headers must travel
034 * with the body.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Create instances via the static factory methods:
038 * <p class='bjava'>
039 *    <jc>// Body with content type header</jc>
040 *    HttpResource <jv>resource</jv> = HttpResourceBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(FileBody.<jsm>of</jsm>(myFile))
041 *       .withHeader(ContentType.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"application/pdf"</js>))
042 *       .withHeader(ContentDisposition.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"attachment; filename=\"report.pdf\""</js>));
043 * </p>
044 *
045 * <p>
046 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
047 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in
048 * the <b>next major</b> Juneau release (and possibly earlier).
049 *
050 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
051 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
052 * </ul>
053 *
054 * @since 9.2.1
055 */
056public final class HttpResourceBean implements HttpResource {
057
058   private final HttpBody body;
059   private final List<HttpHeader> headers;
060
061   private HttpResourceBean(HttpBody body, List<HttpHeader> headers) {
062      this.body = body;
063      this.headers = List.copyOf(headers);
064   }
065
066   /**
067    * Creates an {@link HttpResourceBean} wrapping the given body with no additional headers.
068    *
069    * @param body The body. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
070    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
071    */
072   public static HttpResourceBean of(HttpBody body) {
073      assertArgNotNull("body", body);
074      return new HttpResourceBean(body, List.of());
075   }
076
077   /**
078    * Creates an {@link HttpResourceBean} wrapping the given body and headers.
079    *
080    * @param body The body. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
081    * @param headers The associated headers. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
082    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
083    */
084   public static HttpResourceBean of(HttpBody body, List<HttpHeader> headers) {
085      assertArgNotNull("body", body);
086      assertArgNotNull("headers", headers);
087      return new HttpResourceBean(body, headers);
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * Returns a new instance with the given header added.
092    *
093    * @param header The header to add. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
094    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
095    */
096   public HttpResourceBean withHeader(HttpHeader header) {
097      assertArgNotNull("header", header);
098      var newHeaders = new ArrayList<>(headers);
099      newHeaders.add(header);
100      return new HttpResourceBean(body, newHeaders);
101   }
102
103   /**
104    * Returns a new instance with the given header name and value added.
105    *
106    * @param name The header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
107    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
108    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
109    */
110   public HttpResourceBean withHeader(String name, String value) {
111      return withHeader(HttpHeaderBean.of(name, value));
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Returns a new instance with the given headers added.
116    *
117    * @param toAdd The headers to add. {@code null} entries are ignored.
118    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
119    */
120   public HttpResourceBean withHeaders(HttpHeader...toAdd) {
121      if (toAdd == null || toAdd.length == 0)
122         return this;
123      var newHeaders = new ArrayList<>(headers);
124      for (var h : toAdd)
125         if (h != null)
126            newHeaders.add(h);
127      return new HttpResourceBean(body, newHeaders);
128   }
129
130   /**
131    * Returns a new instance with the given headers added.
132    *
133    * @param toAdd The headers to add. {@code null} entries are ignored.
134    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
135    */
136   public HttpResourceBean withHeaders(List<HttpHeader> toAdd) {
137      if (e(toAdd))
138         return this;
139      var newHeaders = new ArrayList<>(headers);
140      for (var h : toAdd)
141         if (h != null)
142            newHeaders.add(h);
143      return new HttpResourceBean(body, newHeaders);
144   }
145
146   /**
147    * Returns the underlying body.
148    *
149    * @return The body. Never <jk>null</jk>.
150    */
151   public HttpBody getBody() {
152      return body;
153   }
154
155   @Override /* HttpResource */
156   public List<HttpHeader> getHeaders() {
157      return headers;
158   }
159
160   /**
161    * Returns the first header with the given name (case-insensitive), or <jk>null</jk> if absent.
162    *
163    * @param name The header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
164    * @return The first matching header, or <jk>null</jk>.
165    */
166   public HttpHeader getFirstHeader(String name) {
167      assertArgNotNull("name", name);
168      return headers.stream().filter(h -> eqic(h.getName(), name)).findFirst().orElse(null);
169   }
170
171   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
172   // HttpBody delegation
173   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
174
175   @Override /* HttpBody */
176   public String getContentType() {
177      var ct = getFirstHeader("Content-Type");
178      return ct != null ? ct.getValue() : body.getContentType();
179   }
180
181   @Override /* HttpBody */
182   public long getContentLength() {
183      return body.getContentLength();
184   }
185
186   @Override /* HttpBody */
187   public boolean isRepeatable() {
188      return body.isRepeatable();
189   }
190
191   @Override /* HttpBody */
192   public void writeTo(OutputStream out) throws IOException {
193      body.writeTo(out);
194   }
195
196   @Override /* Object */
197   public String toString() {
198      return body.toString();
199   }
200}
